apps.name: Chromium
apps.description: An interactive e-ink browser: on-device Chromium driven over CDP — tap to click, swipe to scroll, type on the built-in keyboard, browse anywhere with the URL bar, ChatGPT-ready.

apps.name: PaperTerm
apps.description: A real terminal for your tablet, with an on-screen keyboard and fast partial e-ink updates.

apps.name: The Diary
apps.description: An enchanted diary: write to it with the pen — it writes back, and it remembers.

apps.name: Store
apps.description: Browse and install apps right on the tablet — no computer needed.

apps.name: Bad Apple
apps.description: Bad Apple at max FPS on e-ink — a benchmark that plays the whole video through quill's batched per-tile fast path, the way Wenting's Modos monitor does.
